title: 方程式のオーサーシップ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has won this race with ease! She truly
stands apart from the rest! We've witnessed
something incredible today, folks!
Blip.

I've watched Narita Brian's Japanese Derby race
countless times already.

Once the autumn Tenno Sho is over, we'll be up
against her at the Arima Kinen.

And I have a feeling she'll be even better than she
was at the Derby...

It's the final day to make adjustments for the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That time's not too bad. All right!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to go over these results in our meeting.
And just to be sure, let's take a look at the dirt
track data from the other day, so—
choice_data_list: It's a good thing I have it ready, then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you. You've really been on top of
your game recently.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I daresay you might even be a little too on top of
your game.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think we've gone over everything we can for
today. Now we just have to wait for the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to bed early tonight. I'd hate to
oversleep tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Try not to read too much into it. I'm just
saying we should both be careful.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: All right, then. See you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

After Biwa Hayahide leaves my office, I decide to
tie up some loose ends before resting up for
tomorrow.

I still need to organize our meeting minutes... I
already checked current Tokyo Racecourse
conditions...

And I've replied to that reporter's email... What
else do I need to do? I hope I'm not forgetting
anything.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz...

Biwa Hayahide has been pretty fatigued recently.
I need to order some of those new icing products
to help with that...
Click.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd be here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What? Did you think I hadn't noticed anything off
about you lately?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Geez...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has taken the lead! Her opponents
may be the finest racers out there, but she's not
giving up her spot, folks!
Blip.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Look at you—sitting here at your computer in the
dark and leaving the TV on despite not watching
it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What's worse is that you're playing nothing but
footage from Brian's race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why are you taking all of this on by yourself?
Shouldn't we be working on it together?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If you overwork yourself and collapse, I'll have to
face the race all by myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How can I do that after we've been working so
long on the winning equation together?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: "I'm sorry" isn't going to cut it. I'm mad.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You don't understand how important you are to
me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for you, I probably never would have
made my debut.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And during the Classics, I probably would have
been paralyzed with anxiety because of how much
better Ticket and Taishin were than me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You made me who I am today. You're the reason
I've been able to pursue my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that day we decided to rebuild my
winning equation from scratch... No, since even
before that! If not for you, I—

Her shoulders are shaking, her eyes are rimmed
with red... And it's dark.

My computer screen must've switched off at some
point.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The second you get home, rest.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: One last thing...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We're a team. One of us doing this without the
other would be like trying to win a race with one
leg.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And we're in this to win, right?

I move my bedtime up a little earlier from this day
forward.

I need to be in top condition so we can solve her
winning equation. Together.
